metadata.description: Sequenced multi-agent workflow with persona stitching, flow profiles, and per-step multi-level review

plugins.name: hyperflow
plugins.description: Sequenced multi-agent workflow for Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, Codex, Antigravity. Chain: scaffold → spec → scope → dispatch → audit → deploy. Thinking models think, worker models execute. Multi-level review L1–L5 inside every step, 15 stitched personas, 6 flow profiles, persistent project memory.
